title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Tickezo's been aiming for the Japanese Derby all
along, right?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Not just Tickezo—Taishin and Hayahide are too!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I guess we can expect a pretty hot
showdown then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At some point during the Twinkle Series, the
three friends started being referred to as "BNW."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many fans have shown up at the Japanese Derby
just to see the famous trio in action.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amid the excitement, Ticket is on standby in the
waiting room, when she suddenly looks up at me
with a serious expression.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I can inspire people just like the
Umamusume I saw back then?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Will they be cheering for me? Will they get
pumped up when they see me run?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't stop fidgeting, so I show her the
broadcast of Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
At last, the Japanese Derby is about to kick off.
The track is packed to the brim with fans!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The camera pans up to show the eagerly waiting
audience. Many fans are holding large signs and
banners to show their support, and among them
is...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh! That one says "Good luck, Tickezo!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a huge banner, and it's just for Winning
Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Heeey! You got this, Tickezo!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
What passionate cheers! I'm sure Winning Ticket
must be thrilled to hear them!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I am! I hear you, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Ticket stares intently at the screen, tears begin
to well up in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... Sniff... I'm so glad! Everyone's really hyped!
choice_data_list: Show them all your passion for the Derby!
Show them all your passion for the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best! More than my best!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: FOR THE DEEERRRBYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if to match her enthusiasm, a big wave of
cheers can be heard on the broadcast right at
that moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the gates open and the Derby begins!
